text:
Once upon a time there lived an elderly man in a small village. He lived alone apart from his loyal cat. Every day he'd go out to his garden to prune the roses. One day, while he was collecting dead wood, he heard bird songs.

He came closer to what seemed to be birds singing... or perhaps a choir? There was a peculiar smell, fruity and sweet. Intrigued, he ventured further through the underbrush. He tripped over something wooden.

Looking down, he saw a glass bottle. A few petals were still clinging to some honeyed scent inside.

Curiosity got the better of him. He picked it up and rubbed the neck.

Suddenly he felt strange. He blinked, trying to clear his vision. Everything was blurry. A woman approached quickly...

Her face was carved ice. She snatched the bottle away from him and spat into it.

"What sort of thing is this?" she asked sharply.

The old man felt his hands go suddenly weak. He
